name: kinguila
description: Plataforma P2P de compra e venda de divisas entre particulares.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "bun run dev:api" "bun run dev:web"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/contracts build && bun run --cwd apps/api build && bun run --cwd apps/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd packages/contracts typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/api typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck
